title: New DFU screen - Translations
scenario: Verify that translations on the new DFU screen display correctly without broken words or truncation when the phone is set to a supported language and an update is available for EB/CC on Osprey.
steps: Set phone to a supported language.
Open the app with an update for EB/CC for Osprey.
Check the text on the screen.
expected: Text is correct, no broken words, and all visible.
